verdict_reasoning: B2M is a non-covalent structural partner of the MHC class I heavy chain, assembled intracellularly in the ER and co-trafficked to the cell surface as an integral component of the mature MHC class I trimeric complex (heavy chain + β2M + peptide). The protein lacks its own membrane anchor but is stably bound to the anchored heavy chain throughout the complex's lifecycle and is surface-displayed on nearly all nucleated cells.
